---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new functionality
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: ['type: enhancement']
assignees: []

---

## 🧩 Problem Description

Is your feature request related to a specific problem or limitation?  
Describe the issue clearly. Example: *"I'm frustrated when I can't..."*

---

## 🚀 Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or improvement you'd like to see implemented.  
Be specific and avoid vague suggestions like “make it better.”

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches, plugins, or designs you’ve thought about or tried.

---

## 📎 Additional Context

Include any relevant information, mockups, links, or screenshots that support your request.
